title: Mermaid diagram rendering and management utilities
purpose: Provides functions to initialize, render, validate, and manage Mermaid diagrams with theme support and error handling.
module_context: Exports type definitions for Theme, Format, MermaidInitOptions, and RenderResult. Also exports MermaidError class and internal state variable isInitialized.

steps.content: Check if Mermaid is already initialized.
IF not initialized, prepare the initialization configuration with default values.
Initialize Mermaid with the prepared configuration.
Mark Mermaid as initialized.
IF initialization fails, throw a MermaidError with the original error.
Check if Mermaid is initialized and initialize if needed.
Update the theme configuration if different from current initialization.
Render the diagram content to SVG format.
IF rendering fails, throw a MermaidError with the original error.
Return the rendered SVG string.
Render the diagram to SVG format with the specified theme.
Extract width and height from the SVG viewBox or attributes.
Parse width and height values from viewBox if present.
IF width is not extracted from viewBox, try to extract it from width attribute.
IF height is not extracted from viewBox, try to extract it from height attribute.
Return the SVG string along with extracted dimensions.
Check if the diagram content is empty or whitespace.
Trim the diagram content for validation.
Check if the diagram content starts with a known Mermaid diagram type.
IF validation fails, return false.
ELSE return true if the diagram content is valid.
Retrieve the current Mermaid configuration.
Extract and return the theme from the configuration.
IF no theme is configured, return 'default' as the fallback.
Initialize Mermaid with the specified theme.
IF setting the theme fails, throw a MermaidError with the original error.
Reset the internal initialization flag to false.
Notify Mermaid that content has loaded to reset its state.
IF the content loaded notification fails, ignore the error.
Return the current initialization status of Mermaid.
